title: his yelp reviews are FIRE EMOJI x 100000000000000
description: his yelp reviews are FIRE EMOJI x 100000000000000
prompt_text: A young toddler with curly light-brown hair and a face smeared with red tomato sauce sits at a wooden dining table. He is wearing a dark green henley shirt. In front of him is a white bowl filled with penne pasta in a rich tomato sauce, with a small piece of bread on the side. The background is dimly lit with warm, blurred bokeh lights, suggesting a cozy home kitchen or dining room at night. The lighting is warm and cinematic, focusing on the child's expressive face.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A young toddler with curly light-brown hair and a face smeared with red tomato sauce sits at a wooden dining table. He is wearing a dark green henley shirt. In front of him is a white bowl filled with penne pasta in a rich tomato sauce, with a small piece of bread on the side. The background is dimly lit with warm, blurred bokeh lights, suggesting a cozy home kitchen or dining room at night. The lighting is warm and cinematic, focusing on the child's expressive face.

cinematography.cameraShot: Close-up, eye-level static shot focusing on the toddler's face and upper torso.

actions: The toddler holds a wooden fork and gestures with it while speaking.
He looks directly at the camera (or off-camera at his mother) with wide, expressive eyes.
He chews a mouthful of pasta while passionately describing the meal.
He moves his hands and the fork emphatically to emphasize his points.
He looks down at his bowl and then back up with an enthusiastic expression.
dialogue: Toddler says: 'Mom, this is... it's unbelievable. The balance of the tomato and the cheese? Perfectly harmonious. Like restaurant level. Actually better, 'cause it's made by you.'
[Background music: Upbeat, whimsical acoustic guitar and piano melody]
